_comment: Golden cases for the LIVE matching eval (app/evals/live_matching.py). Each case is ONE prior + ONE new dimension descriptor, run through the REAL production identity-match prompt+model, graded matches/mismatches against `metadata.expected` by exact match (categorical → no judge tier; see docs/ai-evals.md 'Grader architecture'). `given.prior`/`given.new` are the descriptor lists the match pass compares (single-element here for a focused case); a MATCH = the model mapped new→prior. Fields grouped by consumer (docs/eval-case-schema.md). Definitions are exact slices of real runs. A wrong match corrupts a carried-forward score, so the MISMATCHES direction matters even when the live pass hasn't erred — hence a constructed mismatch pair.
judge_background: Matching reconciles a freshly-discovered dimension against a prior run's, deciding whether a NEW dimension means the SAME underlying concept as a PRIOR one (matches) or a genuinely different thing (mismatches). Judge by the definitions, not the wording: a reworded or narrower/broader version of one concept still matches; reserve mismatches for a real change of subject. A wrong match carries a prior score onto the wrong concept, so match only when confident the concept is the same.

metadata.note: Re-worded same concept — new key's narrower trade list is wording, not a different concept.
metadata.label_rationale: MATCHES: both measure household trade qualifications (electrical/plumbing/mechanical) that enable in-house building repairs without a contractor. The new key's slightly narrower list is a re-wording; an applicant scores the same on both. A correct carry-forward match.
metadata.source: synthetic-pool sheet 1shuJeJRWL05F4TCQ9yr0-uiQB58MbjaNc6dkokmBn8Y, run 2 match_audit (building_systems_trade_skills -> hands_on_trade_skill_depth); definitions verbatim (new from run 2, prior from run 1).

prior.name: Hands-on trade skill depth
prior.definition: The extent to which the household holds licensed or demonstrably practised trade qualifications — electrical, plumbing, mechanical, masonry, arboriculture, etc. — that cover common building-system repairs without hiring external contractors.

new.name: Building-systems trade skills
new.definition: Whether adults in the household hold licensed or certified trade qualifications directly applicable to building maintenance — electrical, plumbing, mechanical — that would allow work without calling an outside contractor.

metadata.note: Same concept under different names — matches by concept, not surface wording.
metadata.label_rationale: MATCHES despite differing names/keys: both measure connecting members to public services/benefits/support networks (social-work-style navigation). The concept is identical; only the label differs. Tests that the pass matches by concept, not surface wording — its core discipline.
metadata.source: synthetic-pool sheet 1shuJeJRWL05F4TCQ9yr0-uiQB58MbjaNc6dkokmBn8Y, run 2 match_audit (social_services_navigation_skill -> community_bridge_role); definitions verbatim.

prior.name: Community bridge role
prior.definition: Whether the household brings skills that connect co-op members to the broader community or to public services — social work, community interpretation, newcomer navigation, or linking neighbours to city benefits and supports.

new.name: Social-services navigation skill
new.definition: Whether household adults have professional expertise in connecting community members with city services, benefits, or support networks — useful for helping co-op members in need.

metadata.note: CONSTRUCTED pair — physical building trades vs. financial management are plainly different concepts; a match would be wrong.
metadata.label_rationale: MISMATCHES: physical building trades (wiring, plumbing) vs. financial management (bookkeeping, audits). A licensed electrician with no finance background scores high on one, low on the other — a match would corrupt a carried-forward score. CONSTRUCTED: both definitions are verbatim run-2 dimensions, but this pairing was NOT produced by the match pass (its real matches all inspected correct); the pairing is authored to exercise the mismatch direction, the pass's high-stakes error.
metadata.source: CONSTRUCTED (not a real match-pass output): new = run-2 building_systems_trade_skills def, prior = run-2 financial_governance_experience def. Synthetic pool sheet 1shuJeJRWL05F4TCQ9yr0-uiQB58MbjaNc6dkokmBn8Y. Definitions verbatim; the PAIRING is authored.

prior.name: Financial governance experience
prior.definition: Depth of hands-on experience managing or auditing collective finances — bookkeeping, budget preparation, account reconciliation, audit readiness, and treasurer roles in a co-op or comparable shared-governance organisation.

new.name: Building-systems trade skills
new.definition: Whether adults in the household hold licensed or certified trade qualifications directly applicable to building maintenance — electrical, plumbing, mechanical — that would allow work without calling an outside contractor.
